foodsharingIdHelp.title: Find your Foodsharing ID
foodsharingIdHelp.intro: Use this number in any field that asks for your Foodsharing ID.
foodsharingIdHelp.step3: Go to your profile by clicking your picture in the top right and then clicking Profile
foodsharingIdHelp.step4: On your profile you should see ID: XXXX
foodsharingIdHelp.imageAlt: Foodsharing profile page showing where to find the ID
foodsharingIdHelp.imageCaption: The number after ID is the one you need to enter.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.onlyThreePickups: Only users with 3 or more EinAbs
adminAutomation.title: Automation
adminAutomation.cleaningStoreMissing: Configure the cleaning store ID in the district settings first.
adminAutomation.noAutomations: No automations match the current filter.
adminAutomation.modeActive: Automation is active and will run live.
adminAutomation.modeDryRun: Automation is in dry-run mode. Store-level dry-run cannot override this.
adminAutomation.modeDisabled: Automation is disabled at the application level.
adminAutomation.rulesIntro: Each store can enable its own rule set. During a run, the system evaluates every pending EinAb request for enabled stores and records the result in the automation decisions table below.
adminAutomation.rulesRunTitle: What gets checked during a run
adminAutomation.rulesRunEnabledStores: Only stores with automation enabled are processed.
adminAutomation.rulesRunPendingOnly: Only EinAb requests that are still waiting for confirmation are evaluated. Already confirmed requests are skipped.
adminAutomation.rulesRunOrder: Requests are checked store by store, and the decision reasons are saved for every evaluated request.
adminAutomation.rulesRunDryRunOverride: A store-level dry-run applies only to that store; the app-wide dry-run setting still forces dry-run globally.
adminAutomation.rulesRunDryRun: A dry-run uses the same logic but does not confirm or decline anything on Foodsharing. It only shows what would happen.
adminAutomation.rulesGracePeriodBody: If an EinAb is less than 72 hours away, all automation rules are skipped and the request is allowed automatically.
adminAutomation.rulesGapSameStore: The gap rule checks whether the same person already has another EinAb in the same store.
adminAutomation.rulesGapCalendarDays: The gap is calculated in calendar days in the Zurich timezone, excluding the EinAb days themselves.
adminAutomation.rulesGapExample: Example: if the minimum gap is 2, an EinAb on Monday and another on Wednesday is still too close because only Tuesday lies between them.
adminAutomation.rulesExperienceOwnHistor: A person counts as experienced in a store if Foodsharing membership data shows at least one previous EinAb there.
adminAutomation.rulesExperienceCoPickup: If the person has no experience, the request can still pass when another person on the same EinAb is experienced in that store.
adminAutomation.rulesCleaningExemption: If a Foodsharing ID has a cleaning exemption, the cleaning rule is skipped for that person.
adminAutomation.rulesCleaningHistory: Otherwise the system checks the cleaning store configured for the current district within the configured lookback period.
adminAutomation.rulesCleaningFuture: The rule also passes if the person already has a future cleaning EinAb planned.
adminAutomation.rulesCleaningOverride: If neither of those is true, the request is normally declined. It is only allowed as an override when fewer than four future cleaning slots are still empty.
adminAutomation.futurePickupUsers: Users with future EinAbs in your stores

error.TEACHER_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED: An EinAb giver account is required.
error.TEACHER_EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: This Foodsharing ID is already registered.
error.TEACHER_FOODSHARING_ID_ALREADY_EXI: This Foodsharing ID is already registered.
error.TEACHER_INACTIVE: The EinAb giver account is inactive.
error.SLOT_NOT_AVAILABLE: The slot is no longer available.
error.USER_ALREADY_BOOKED_WITH_TEACHER: You already have a booking with this EinAb giver.
error.USER_ALREADY_BOOKED_IN_CATEGORY: You already have a booking in this category.
error.USER_BOOKING_LIMIT_REACHED: You can only have up to three active bookings.
error.MINIMUM_PICKUP_COUNT_NOT_REACHED: You have not yet reached the required number of previous EinAbs.
error.ONLY_OWN_BOOKINGS_CANCELLABLE: You can only cancel your own bookings.
error.ONLY_BOOKED_APPOINTMENTS_CANCELLAB: Only booked appointments can be cancelled.
error.ONLY_OWN_EINABS_MANAGEABLE: You can only manage your own EinAbs.
error.SLOT_COUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE: Slot count must be between 1 and 3.
error.SLOT_COUNT_REDUCTION_NOT_SUPPORTED: Slot count can only be increased.
error.BOOKED_SLOTS_PREVENT_DELETE: Booked or completed slots prevent deletion.
error.DEFAULT_ADMIN_CANNOT_BE_CHANGED: The default admin cannot be changed.
admin.userPermissionsHelp: Grant only the permissions each user needs. Changes apply with their next session.
automation.applicationsInstruction1: Add the store under Slot Approval first, then review its settings here.
automation.applicationsInstruction2: Enable approval only for stores where pending applicants should be accepted automatically.
automation.applicationsInstruction3: Keep per-store dry-run enabled until the audit log shows the actions you expect.
automation.applicationsInstruction4: Only open applications are processed, and every outcome is logged below.
automation.requestDecisionMissingData: No open request, missing user ID, or missing distance
automation.requestDecisionTooFar: Distance rule active and distance exceeds maximum
automation.requestDecisionTooFarMessage: Die Anfrage wurde automatisch abgelehnt, weil die Entfernung von {{distanceInKm}} km das Maximum von {{maximumDistance}} km überschreitet.
automation.requestDecisionDryRunNote: In dry-run mode the same decisions are only logged as WOULD_*.
automation.slotsInstruction1: Add a managed store first, then configure its rules.
automation.slotsInstruction2: Review the audit output before enabling gap, cleaning, or experience rules.
automation.slotsInstruction3: Keep dry-run enabled per store until the expected decisions appear.
automation.slotsInstruction4: Run a dry-run and check the audit log before switching a store live.
automation.slotsDecisionRecentPickup: EinAb is less than 72 hours away
automation.slotsDecisionGapRule: Gap rule is active and the user had another EinAb too recently
automation.slotsDecisionExperienceRule: Experience rule is active and the user lacks experience in this store
automation.slotsDecisionCleaningRuleOver: Cleaning rule is active, the user lacks an exemption, and there are too few free cleaning slots
automation.slotsDecisionCleaningRuleDecl: Cleaning rule is active, the user lacks an exemption, and no override applies
automation.slotsDecisionRecentPickupMess: The EinAb is less than 72 hours away; the automation rules are skipped.
automation.slotsDecisionGapRuleMessage: There are only {{gapDays}} day{{gapSuffix}} between the EinAbs; at least {{minimumGapDays}} day{{minimumGapSuffix}} are required.
automation.slotsDecisionExperienceRuleMe: This EinAb requires experience in this store. Neither you nor any accompanying person has it.
automation.slotsDecisionCleaningRuleOver: Du warst schon länger nicht mehr einen Fairteiler putzen. Wir haben dir den Slot am {{pickupDate}} erlaubt, da es aktuell nur {{freeCleaningSlots}} freie Reinigungsslots gibt bei der Fairteilerreinigung. Buch dir doch einen der freien Reinigungsslots: {{openCleaningSlots}}.
automation.slotsDecisionCleaningRuleDecl: You have not cleaned a Fairteiler in the last {{backCheckMonths}} month{{backCheckSuffix}}. {{historyText}} You also have no future cleaning planned. Please sign up for a cleaning so that you can continue booking EinAbs. Book one of the available cleaning slots: {{openCleaningSlots}}.
automation.slotsDecisionOtherwiseMessage: All enabled EinAb automation rules passed.
automation.slotsDecisionDryRunNote: In dry-run mode the same decisions are only logged as WOULD_*.
automation.advertisementsInstruction1: Create an alert with the button below; stores start with no alerts.
automation.advertisementsInstruction2: Choose how many hours before an open EinAb it runs.
automation.advertisementsInstruction3: Choose store chat, Telegram, or both.
automation.advertisementsInstruction4: Store chat and Telegram each have their own templates.
automation.advertisementsInstruction5: Separate alternative templates with a line containing ---.
automation.noAdvertisements: No alerts configured for this store.
automation.telegramSetupInstruction1: Create a bot with @BotFather and copy its token.
automation.telegramSetupInstruction2: Invite the bot into the group chat where you want to post alerts.
automation.telegramSetupInstruction3: Save the token here, then refresh chats so the group appears in the selector.
automation.telegramSetupInstruction4: Add one or more Telegram message templates; one is picked at random for each Telegram alert.
automation.messagesRandomizedNote: One message is chosen at random every time an alert is sent.
